title: S4b: critical patterns -> patterns/, this feature's work item + plan + canonical templates
action: Data authoring into the validated bundle. (1) Migrate docs/history/learnings/critical-patterns.md into docs/knowledge/patterns/ as bee.pattern concepts (one per pattern heading; bee.critical true; bee.polarity per content; timestamp from the entry's [YYYYMMDD] tag; source file becomes a pointer stub with heading->concept map per D37 — AGENTS.md step 5 and preamble digests keep working through the stub). Coverage law (D35): every pattern heading lands in exactly one concept — extend scripts/okf_migrate.mjs --check with a critical-patterns mapping if its area model does not fit; otherwise record the heading->concept table in the stub and assert via the existing check shape. (2) Author work/okf-foundation/work-item.md (type bee.work-item, D26: outcome, scope, acceptance, decisions D17-D38 cited, chosen approach — condensed FROM CONTEXT.md/plan.md, never invented) and work/okf-foundation/plan.md (type bee.plan — the slice table + exit states from docs/history/okf-foundation/plan.md; high-risk lane so a separate plan concept is correct per D26). required_context on the work item: /areas/advisor-protocol/overview.md, relevant /patterns/ entries, /decisions if any. (3) Add a '## Templates' section to docs/specs/okf-profile.md: three complete canonical examples (work-item, plan, delivery) in exact emitter-canonical form — the authoring reference for every future feature (D34's templates deliverable). (4) bee knowledge index regen + log.md entry. (5) Verify: bee knowledge check --json zero errors zero warnings; bee knowledge list --type bee.pattern --json shows the patterns; index --check green; full chain green. ONE commit.

truths: bee knowledge check --json: zero errors, zero warnings
every critical-patterns heading maps to exactly one bee.pattern concept (table in the stub, counts quoted in trace)
work/okf-foundation/work-item.md resolves: bee knowledge list --type bee.work-item shows it; its required_context paths all exist
okf-profile.md Templates section examples pass a round-trip (paste one into a temp bundle file, check reports zero not_canonical — evidence in trace, temp file removed)
prohibitions: no invented facts in work-item/plan concepts — condensed from CONTEXT.md/plan.md only (D10)
no lib/templates/*.mjs edits in this cell EXCEPT scripts/okf_migrate.mjs if the critical-patterns check needs it (declare in trace if touched)
